import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Button } from '../components/ui/button'; import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '../components/ui/card'; import { Shield, User, Settings, LogOut, Plus, Eye, Download, Trash2, Edit, Camera, CreditCard, FileText } from 'lucide-react'; const Account = () => { const [user] = useState({ name: 'John Doe', email: 'john.doe@example.com', avatar: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1472099645785-5658abf4ff4e?w=150&h=150&fit=crop&crop=face' }); const [documents] = useState([ { id: 1, name: 'Driver License', type: 'License', date: '2024-01-15', status: 'Active', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1554224155-6726b3ff858f?w=300&h=200&fit=crop' }, { id: 2, name: 'Passport', type: 'Passport', date: '2023-12-20', status: 'Active', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1554224155-6726b3ff858f?w=300&h=200&fit=crop' }, { id: 3, name: 'Health Insurance Card', type: 'Insurance', date: '2024-02-01', status: 'Active', image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1554224155-6726b3ff858f?w=300&h=200&fit=crop' } ]); return (
